topic: My smart home devices started responding to a voice that is not mine. The voice knows my full name.
title: My Smart Home Started Obeying a Voice That Is Not Mine. It Knows My Full Name | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My smart home started obeying a voice that is not mine. The voice knows my full name.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smart speaker on a nightstand in a dark bedroom, a faint blue ring glowing around the top, no people, night lighting, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It started two months ago. Lights turning on at 4AM. Doors unlocking on their own.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior shot of a dark hallway with a smart lock panel glowing green on a door, the hallway empty and still, 4:00AM shown on a wall clock, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I checked the activity log. Commands were being issued. The voice print was not mine.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a tablet screen showing a smart home activity log with timestamps all in the early morning hours, a column marked VOICE ID showing UNKNOWN, dim room light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I called the company. They said the voice was registered as the primary account holder.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand holding a phone to an ear, the face not visible, a smart speaker glowing in the background on a shelf, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The voice had been active for eleven months. I only bought the device four months ago.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a receipt on a desk showing a purchase date four months prior, beside a laptop showing eleven months of voice activity logs, desk lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I listened to the recordings. A calm man's voice. Giving commands inside my home.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of over-ear headphones on a desk beside a laptop, the audio waveform visible on screen showing a voice recording, the room dark except for the screen glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He said my full name. Then my address. Then he said I will be home in four minutes.
scenes.image_prompt: extreme close up of a smart speaker with a bright blue ring lit up, the room around it completely dark, no other light sources, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I pulled into my driveway four minutes later.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior shot of a house driveway at night, a car parked with headlights off, one interior light on in the house, the front door visible and closed, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I disconnected everything. Unplugged every device. Changed every lock.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of multiple smart home devices piled in a cardboard box, wires tangled, a smart speaker face down on top, dim room light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I found a small microphone hidden behind my bedroom outlet plate. Not a product I own.
scenes.image_prompt: extreme close up of an electrical outlet on a wall with the cover plate removed, a small black device visible inside, a flashlight beam illuminating it, vertical 9:16 framing
extreme close up of the small device removed and held in an open palm, a tiny red LED blinking slowly on its surface, dark background, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The light in my hallway turned on. I had unplugged it three days ago.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior shot of a hallway from one end, a ceiling light glowing at the other end, the hallway empty and still, all doors closed, no visible wires connected to the light fixture, vertical 9:16 framing
